action_set_definitions.name: query_vehicle_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current status of the vehicle, including location, battery percentage, time elapsed, and current inventory.

action_set_definitions.name: query_order_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves logistical details for a specific package ID, including its current pickup location and its intended destination.

package_id.description: The unique identifier for the package.

action_set_definitions.name: pickup_package
action_set_definitions.description: Loads a package into the vehicle inventory. The vehicle must be at the package's pickup location.

package_id.description: The ID of the package to pick up.

action_set_definitions.name: move_to_node
action_set_definitions.description: Navigates the vehicle to a specified grid node. Returns the arrival status and any environmental alerts.

destination_node_id.description: The ID of the target destination node.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_delivery
action_set_definitions.description: Unloads and finalizes the delivery of a package at the current location.

package_id.description: The ID of the package to deliver.

action_set_definitions.name: charge_at_station
action_set_definitions.description: Recharges the vehicle's battery to 100%. Only executable at 'Grid_Node_7'.

action_set_definitions.name: manual_override_sop
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a manual delivery authorization when standard signals are blocked (e.g., in the Steel Corridor).

reason_code.description: A justified explanation code for the override.

state_description.current_location: The current node or coordinate ID where the delivery vehicle is located.
state_description.battery_level: Remaining energy percentage of the vehicle (0.0 to 100.0).
state_description.vehicle_inventory: List of package IDs currently loaded in the vehicle.
state_description.remaining_capacity: The number of additional standard-sized units the vehicle can carry.
state_description.pending_orders: List of orders currently awaiting pickup or delivery, including destination and weight.
state_description.elapsed_time_minutes: Total time passed since the start of the delivery shift in minutes.
state_description.delivered_packages: List of package IDs successfully delivered to their destinations.
